feed.title: 9GAG
feed.subtitle: Hot posts from 9gag.com (no native feed; parsed from the page's window._config JSON). NSFW posts are tagged [NSFW].

entry.title: Toe-tally killing it.
The Jackass: Best and Last drone show delivered exactly the kind of chaos you hope for.
Years pass. Friendships remain. The chaos stays exactly the same.
Classic long game setup
This is the start of the post

Islamic Regime supporters pulling out Ayatollah Khamanei’s’ coffin from a portable Freezer. This looks like something from the Walking Dead.

The Soviet Union is dead, but Soviet-era jokes are back
This is how based our cartoons were. It taught us to think without we even realised it.

Oxford mathematician reveals a fast way to tie your shoes y'inquisition
Level of wealth money cannot buy

43rd bday and wife and son didn’t even get me a 50 cent card or even a text message. I’m always expected to spend thousands of dollars on them on holiday and bdays. Not anymore. At least I got my 9gag degenerates. Fock you and see you tomorrow
Safety is number one priority
"They're eating the dogs. The people that came in they're eating the cats. They're eating the pets of the people that live there."
